channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch Uruguay vs Cape Verde: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Uruguay vs Cape Verde for free online and from anywhere as World Cup 2026 underdogs Cape Verde look to spring another surprise.

item.title: Bose thinks it can be a media company for some reason
item.description: The history books are littered with the corpses of corporate record labels started by companies that had no business being in the music industry. Bose thinks it can be the exception to the rule. It thinks it can be Red Bull. And, while Bose has more of a right to dip its toes into the […]

item.title: Popular free VPN, streaming apps bombard business networks with 'laundered' traffic used by criminals to 'blend into normal consumer noise' — here's how to keep safe
item.description: Residential proxies are both a boon for threat actors and a detriment for their victims, and many of them exist due to a lack of awareness

item.title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash
item.description: Claude Guillemot, who founded Ubisoft with his four brothers, has died at the age of 69.

item.title: How to watch Belgium vs. Iran online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Belgium vs. Iran in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Oubliez Mars : cette lune de Saturne pourrait cacher tout ce qu’il faut pour bâtir une colonie humaine !
item.description: Des chercheurs de la Nasa ont dressé l'inventaire détaillé des ressources naturelles de Titan, l’une des lunes de Saturne. Leur conclusion est frappante : cette lune glacée posséderait les ingrédients nécessaires à la production de nourriture, de carburants et de matériaux, au point de devenir...

item.title: Samsung beats Prime Day to the punch with a massive TV sale — up to $1,500 off best-selling 4K, QLED and OLED TVs
item.description: Just ahead of Prime Day, Samsung has launched a massive TV sale, and I'm rounding up today's 18 best deals, which include record-low prices on 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs.
